final_sql:
WITH youtube_visitors AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT "fullVisitorId"
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170701 AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."hits") h
  WHERE h.value:"page":"pagePath" ILIKE '%YouTube%'
  AND t1."date" >= '20170701' AND t1."date" < '20170801'
),
total_quantity AS (
  SELECT
    h.value:"page":"pagePath" AS product,
    SUM(h.value:"productRevenue") AS total_quantity
  FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170701 AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."hits") h
  WHERE h.value:"page":"pagePath" NOT ILIKE '%YouTube%' 
  AND t1."fullVisitorId" IN (SELECT "fullVisitorId" FROM youtube_visitors)
  AND t1."date" >= '20170701' AND t1."date" < '20170801'
  GROUP BY h.value:"page":"pagePath"
),
top_product AS (
  SELECT
    product,
    total_quantity
  FROM total_quantity
  ORDER BY total_quantity DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT *
FROM top_product;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -20.0; best score among failed candidates; shape: small result confirmed

final_sql:
WITH monthly_conversion_rates AS (
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_TIMESTAMP(t1."date")) AS month,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN h.value:"type" = 'PAGE' AND h.value:"page":"pagePath" ILIKE '%product%' THEN 1 END) AS pageviews,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN h.value:"type" = 'TRANSACTION' THEN 1 END) AS transactions
FROM GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170301 AS t1,
LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."hits") h
WHERE t1."date" >= '20170101' AND t1."date" < '20170401'
GROUP BY month
)
SELECT
  month,
  pageviews,
  transactions,
  (transactions::FLOAT / NULLIF(pageviews, 0)) * 100 AS conversion_rate
FROM monthly_conversion_rates;
selection_reason: Candidate 1 (strategy=default) scored -30.0; best score among failed candidates

final_sql:
WITH inventor_counts AS (
  SELECT
    FLOOR(t1."publication_date" / 10000) * 5 AS period,
    COUNT(DISTINCT i.index) AS inventor_count
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."inventor") i
  WHERE t1."country_code" = 'CA' 
    AND t1."publication_date" >= 19600000 
    AND t1."publication_date" <= 20201231
  GROUP BY period
),
patent_counts AS (
  SELECT
    FLOOR(t1."publication_date" / 10000) * 5 AS period,
    COUNT(t1."publication_number") AS total_patent_count
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS t1
  WHERE t1."country_code" = 'CA' 
    AND t1."publication_date" >= 19600000 
    AND t1."publication_date" <= 20201231
  GROUP BY period
)
SELECT
  ic.period,
  AVG(ic.inventor_count) AS average_inventors,
  pc.total_patent_count
FROM inventor_counts ic
JOIN patent_counts pc ON ic.period = pc.period
GROUP BY ic.period, pc.total_patent_count
ORDER BY ic.period ASC;
selection_reason: Candidate 2 (strategy=flatten_first) scored -25.0; best score among failed candidates

final_sql:
WITH assignee_application_counts AS (
  SELECT
    FLOOR("filing_date" / 10000) AS "year",
    UPPER(TRIM(ah.value:"name"::STRING)) AS "assignee_name",
    COUNT(t1."application_number") AS "application_count"
  FROM PATENTS.PATENTS.PUBLICATIONS AS t1,
  LATERAL FLATTEN(input => t1."assignee_harmonized") ah
  WHERE t1."application_kind" = 'A' 
  GROUP BY FLOOR("filing_date" / 10000), UPPER(TRIM(ah.value:"name"::STRING))
),
max_application_year AS (
  SELECT
    "year",
    "assignee_name",
    "application_count",
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "year" ORDER BY "application_count" DESC) AS rn
  FROM assignee_application_counts
)
SELECT
  "year",
  "assignee_name",
  "application_count"
FROM max_application_year
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY "year"
LIMIT 1;
